# Vismodegib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Vismodegib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Vismodegib</strong> 目前有 <strong>28 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Vismodegib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Erivedge is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with:- symptomatic metastatic basal cell carcinoma- locally advanced basal cell carcinoma inappropriate for surgery or radiotherapy</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L2</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>basal cell carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>medulloblastoma with extensive nodularity（99.9%）</li>
<li>sebaceous adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>sweat gland cancer（99.9%）</li>
<li>xeroderma pigmentosum（99.9%）</li>
<li>skin carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>annular epidermolytic ichthyosis（99.9%）</li>
<li>epidermolysis bullosa simplex with mottled pigmentation（99.9%）</li>
<li>prostate cancer/brain cancer susceptibility（99.8%）</li>
<li>Brenner tumor（99.8%）</li>
<li>cutaneous adenocystic carcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>prostate leiomyoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>skin cancer（99.8%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of sweat gland（99.8%）</li>
<li>fibroma of prostate（99.8%）</li>
<li>benign reproductive system neoplasm（99.8%）</li>
<li>male reproductive organ cancer（99.8%）</li>
<li>trichothiodystrophy photosensitive（99.8%）</li>
<li>eccrine carcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>benign prostate phyllodes tumor（99.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
